patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the hardcoded value in the patch. The patch should not have hardcoded values and should instead use more robust null checks and edge case handling.
patches.changes: + if (p1.parent == null || p2.parent == null) return 0; + if (p1.equals(p2)) return 0; - int r = compareNodePointers(p1.parent, depth1 - 1, p2.parent, depth2 - 1); + int r = compareNodePointers(p1.parent == null ? p1 : p1.parent, depth1 - 1, p2.parent == null ? p2 : p2.parent, depth2 - 1);
patches.diff: + if (p1.parent == null || p2.parent == null) return 0; + if (p1.equals(p2)) return 0; - int r = compareNodePointers(p1.parent, depth1 - 1, p2.parent, depth2 - 1); + int r = compareNodePointers(p1.parent == null ? p1 : p1.parent, depth1 - 1, p2.parent == null ? p2 : p2.parent, depth2 - 1);
patches.original_hypothesis: The null check was not properly implemented in the method, which caused the bug.
